case_title: CONWAY-SHEPHERD, MARILYN VS LEE, JANE DBA MARVEL CLEANERS et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONWAY-SHEPHERD, MARILYN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEE, JANE DBA MARVEL CLEANERS LEE, JUNG DBA MARVEL CLEANERS THE COURT ORDERS THE RETURN OF PLFT'S BLOUSE TO HER FREE OF ANY CHARGE BY DEFENDANT.
